case_number: Criminal Bail Appln. No. S-321 of 2025

chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Bail Appln. No. S-321 of 2025 Applicant: Barkat Rasool Bhutto, Through Mr. Shahzad Gul Shaikh, advocate Complainant Abdul Samad Bhutto, Through Mr. Sanaullah Bhutto, Advocate The State: Through Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Bhangwar, D.P.G for the State Date of hearing 08-08-2025 Date of order 08-08-2025 O R D E R SHAMSUDDIN ABBASI, J.- Through instant criminal bail application, applicant/accused Barkat Rasool Bhutto, seek interim pre-arrest bail in Crime No. 18/2025 of P.S. Lashari for the offence U/s 380, 457, 148, 149 P.P.C, after rejection of his bail plea by learned trial court vide order dated 04.06.2025. 2. At the very outset, learned counsel for the applicant submits that parties have settled their dispute outside the court and complainant party has recorded no objection for grant of bail and in similar circumstances, this court has already granted bail to co-accused Kamran and Imran, hence rule of consistency is applied in the present case. 3. Mr. Sanaullah Bhutto advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the complainant. He has recoded no objection in view of compromise arrived between the parties. Learned D.P.G. has also recorded his no objection 4. It is matter of record that this court has already granted bail to co- accused Kamran and Imran on the basis of compromise between the parties, hence the applicant is also entitled for same relief. 5. In view of above position, instant bail application is allowed. Interim pre- arrest bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 17.06.2025 is confirmed on same terms and conditions. J U D G E Abdul Salam/P.A
